title: Can you put answers from multiple questions into same column?
excerpt: Can you ask two different questions in forms and store their answers both in the same column?

posts.author: joycewong (Joyce Wong)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you ask two different questions in forms and store their answers both in the same column?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @joycewong ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Unfortunately there is a strict one-to-one correspondence between form questions and board columns.

You can of course have as many questions as you would like, but the answers would appear in different columns.

What you could do is create different views to “hide” items that do not have both questions answered.

Let me know if I can help you in any way.

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
